title: - Sortable by fossil density, date, or symbolic type
content:
- Sortable by fossil density, date, or symbolic type

---

## SYMBOLIC TRANSLATION CONVENTIONS

| Symbol | Function |
|--------|----------|
| `.` | Shift layer (surface → system) |
| `_` | Thread through (connect logic) |
| CAPS | System container or ritual |
| Brackets `{}` | Dimensional nest (OS, recursion) |
| PascalCase | Named identity (project, person, place) |
| All lowercase | File or raw logic |
| Glyphs/Icons | To be designed, e.g. `◇`, `Δ`, `↻` |

---

## USER ROLES IN INTERFACE

| Persona | Entry View | Power Level |
|---------|------------|-------------|
| Curious Visitor | Public dashboard | Limited |
| Collaborator | Thread access + UI folders | Moderate |
| Architect (you) | Full access to naming, terminal, recursion | Total |
